popularStory.headline: William Plantagenet Longespée abt 1176 - 1226
popularStory.description:
Illustrious Men
William Longespée was one of 16 Illustrious Men, counselors to King John, who were listed in the preamble to Magna Carta.

William Longespée's birth date is uncertain. He was an illegi …

zh.Salisbury, Wiltshire, England: 英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury於1176年出生在英國時，他的父親Henry II King of England43歲，母親Ida de Tosny Countess of Norfolk15歲。他與Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和11個女兒的父母。他於1188年住在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾阿波萊比。他於1190年登記服兵役。他去世於1226年3月7日在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里享年50歲，埋葬在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury于1176年出生在英国时，他的父亲Henry II King of England43岁，母亲Ida de Tosny Countess of Norfolk15岁。他与Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和11个女儿的父母。他于1188年住在英国英格兰林可爾史爾阿波萊比。他于1190年登记服兵役。他去世于1226年3月7日在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里享年50岁，埋葬在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury was born in 1176, in England, his father, Henry II King of England, was 43 and his mother, Ida de Tosny Countess of Norfolk, was 15. He married Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 11 daughters. He lived in Appleby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom in 1188. He registered for military service in 1190. He died on 7 March 1226, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, at the age of 50, and was buried in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury est né en 1176, à Angleterre, son père, Henry II King of England, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Ida de Tosny Countess of Norfolk, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 11 filles. Il a vécu à Appleby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1188. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1190. Il est décédé le 7 mars 1226, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury 1176 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry II King of England 43 und seine Mutter Ida de Tosny Countess of Norfolk 15. Er hat in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 11 Töchter. 1188 hat er in Appleby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom gelebt. Er hat sich 1190 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 7. März 1226 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England und wurde in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury è nato il nel 1176 nel England, il suo padre, Henry II King of England, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Ida de Tosny Countess of Norfolk, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury nel Salisbury, Wiltshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 11 figlie. Vissuto a Appleby, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito nel 1188. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1190. Morì il 7 marzo 1226, nel Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Salisbury, Wiltshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisburyが1176年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Henry II King of Englandは43歳，母Ida de Tosny Countess of Norfolkは15歳であった。イギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーでEla FitzPatrick Countess of Salisburyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と11人の娘の親であった。彼は1188年にはイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアアップレビーに住んでいた。彼は1190年に兵役登録をした。彼は1226年3月7日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーで50歳で死去し，イギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury(이)가 1176년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry II King of England(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Ida de Tosny Countess of Norfolk(은)는 15세였다. 그는 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 열 명 이상의 딸을 두었다. 1188년도에 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 애플레비에서 살았다. 그는 1190년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1226년 3월 7일 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury nasceu em 1176, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry II King of England, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Ida de Tosny Countess of Norfolk, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 11 filhas. Ele viveu em Appleby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1188. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1190. Ele faleceu em 7 de março de 1226, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury родился в 1176 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Henry II King of England было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Ida de Tosny Countess of Norfolk, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 11 дочерей. Он жил в местности эпплеби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в 1188 году. В 1190 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 7 марта 1226 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury nació en 1176, en Inglaterra, su papá, Henry II King of England, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Ida de Tosny Countess of Norfolk, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 11 hijas. Vivió en Appleby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1188. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1190. Murió el 7 de marzo de 1226, en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.
